Armas notified us by email of the change of time of a 1/4 hour 3days before embarking.dinc very correct 
For the return we had a problem on the understanding of the return ticket , they replied to our email in the hour to reassure us that everything was ok, yet late hour.
I recommend despite bad comments

It is one of two companies offering the Los Cristianos La Gomera route. If the first leg went smoothly, the return was a half-odyssey. Several hours late without even an explanation, fortunately they sent a replacement ship and we were able to leave. Unreliable.

There was no information about the seating areas. Many passengers were complemented by an unfriendly employee from the alleged premium class. When we sat down in the neighbouring class and I wanted to ask if it was right here now, I was approached by the same lady saying "I no English, here is Spain and we speak Spanish. This has never happened to me before. Speechless!!!
